compliance_checklist.architecture: AWS Landing Zone + ECS on EC2 + Multi-AZ

soc2_type2_requirements.requirement: Board / management demonstrate commitment to integrity and ethical values
soc2_type2_requirements.aws_implementation: AWS Artifact for compliance reports; IAM Identity Center with MFA; SCPs enforcing guardrails across all Landing Zone accounts

soc2_type2_requirements.requirement: Relevant and reliable information communicated to achieve control objectives
soc2_type2_requirements.aws_implementation: CloudWatch dashboards, SNS alerts, CloudTrail audit logs centralized in Log Archive account

soc2_type2_requirements.requirement: Restrict access to systems and information assets to authorized users
soc2_type2_requirements.aws_implementation: IAM least-privilege roles for ECS tasks; IAM Identity Center SSO for engineers; MFA enforced; no root account usage; Secrets Manager for all credentials

soc2_type2_requirements.requirement: Formal process for registering new users with appropriate access levels
soc2_type2_requirements.aws_implementation: IAM Identity Center user provisioning; group-based access; SCPs limit account-level permissions

soc2_type2_requirements.requirement: Access rights based on roles; least-privilege enforced
soc2_type2_requirements.aws_implementation: IAM roles per ECS service (task roles); IAM policies scoped to specific S3 buckets, SQS queues, Aurora resources; IAM Access Analyzer detects overly permissive policies

soc2_type2_requirements.requirement: Security measures protect against threats from outside system boundaries
soc2_type2_requirements.aws_implementation: WAF with OWASP managed rules; CloudFront + Shield Standard (DDoS); ALB HTTPS-only; Security Groups deny all inbound except required ports

soc2_type2_requirements.control_name: Encryption of Data in Transit and at Rest
soc2_type2_requirements.requirement: Data must be encrypted in transit and at rest
soc2_type2_requirements.aws_implementation: TLS 1.2+ on ALB, CloudFront, Aurora, ElastiCache; KMS CMK for S3, EBS, Aurora, ElastiCache, SQS; ACM-managed certificates; annual automatic key rotation

soc2_type2_requirements.control_name: Prevention and Detection of Unauthorized Software
soc2_type2_requirements.requirement: Measures to prevent unauthorized or malicious software
soc2_type2_requirements.aws_implementation: ECR image scanning (Inspector v2); GuardDuty threat detection; WAF rules block common exploits; ECS task definitions pinned to specific image versions

soc2_type2_requirements.requirement: Detect and respond to new vulnerabilities; maintain configuration baselines
soc2_type2_requirements.aws_implementation: AWS Config with managed rules; Security Hub aggregates findings; Inspector v2 scans EC2 and ECR; Control Tower guardrails enforce baseline configs

soc2_type2_requirements.requirement: Monitor system components to detect anomalies and incidents
soc2_type2_requirements.aws_implementation: CloudWatch metrics + alarms (CPU, memory, latency, queue depth, error rate); X-Ray distributed tracing; VPC Flow Logs; GuardDuty anomaly detection; CloudTrail API monitoring

soc2_type2_requirements.requirement: Evaluate security events to determine if they constitute security incidents
soc2_type2_requirements.aws_implementation: Security Hub aggregates findings from GuardDuty, Inspector v2, Config; SNS alerts for critical alarms; CloudWatch alarms trigger incident runbooks

soc2_type2_requirements.requirement: Changes to infrastructure authorized, tested, and documented
soc2_type2_requirements.aws_implementation: CodePipeline enforces code → build → test → deploy workflow; CloudTrail records all infrastructure API changes; ECS blue/green deployments allow rollback

soc2_type2_requirements.requirement: System availability and performance monitored against SLA
soc2_type2_requirements.aws_implementation: CloudWatch dashboards track 99.95% SLA; ALB health checks auto-remove unhealthy ECS tasks; Route 53 health checks; Aurora Multi-AZ automatic failover

soc2_type2_requirements.requirement: Environmental protections provide for system availability
soc2_type2_requirements.aws_implementation: 3 Availability Zones for all compute and data services; NAT GW per AZ; Aurora Multi-AZ; ElastiCache Multi-AZ; ECS Auto Scaling; EC2 Auto Scaling Groups

soc2_type2_requirements.requirement: Identify and maintain confidentiality of sensitive information
soc2_type2_requirements.aws_implementation: Stripe tokenization for payment data (PCI-compliant); user PII in Aurora encrypted at rest with KMS CMK; S3 bucket policies block public access; VPC private subnets for all data services

cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.title: Maintain current contact details
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.recommendation: Ensure AWS account contact information is current
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.action: Update billing, security, and operations contact email in AWS Account Settings

cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.title: Ensure MFA is enabled for root account
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.recommendation: Root account must have hardware MFA enabled
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.action: Enable hardware MFA (YubiKey) on root account; lock away root credentials; use IAM Identity Center for day-to-day access

cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.title: Ensure credentials unused for 90 days or greater are disabled
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.recommendation: Identify and disable unused IAM credentials
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.action: IAM Access Analyzer + Config rule: iam-user-unused-credentials-check with 90-day threshold

cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.title: Ensure access keys rotated every 90 days or less
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.recommendation: Rotate IAM access keys regularly
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.action: Use IAM roles exclusively for ECS tasks; no long-lived access keys; Config rule: access-keys-rotated

cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.title: Ensure IAM password policy requires uppercase letters
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.recommendation: Enforce strong password policy
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.action: IAM Password Policy: min 14 chars, uppercase, lowercase, number, symbol, no reuse (24), expire 90 days

cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.title: Ensure MFA is enabled for all IAM users with console access
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.recommendation: All human users must have MFA
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.action: Enforce MFA in IAM Identity Center; SCP denies console access without MFA

cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.title: Ensure hardware MFA is enabled for the root account
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.recommendation: Root must use hardware MFA, not virtual MFA
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.action: Register YubiKey or similar hardware token for root account

cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.title: Ensure IAM policies are attached only to groups or roles
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.recommendation: Do not attach policies directly to IAM users
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.action: All permissions via IAM Identity Center groups or ECS task roles; Config rule: iam-user-no-policies-check

cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.title: Ensure CloudTrail is enabled in all regions
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.recommendation: Organization CloudTrail covers all regions
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.action: Org-level CloudTrail enabled for all regions; logs delivered to S3 in Log Archive account with MFA Delete enabled

cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.title: Ensure CloudTrail log file validation is enabled
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.recommendation: Enable log file validation to detect tampering
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.action: Enable LogFileValidation on CloudTrail trail

cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.title: Ensure CloudTrail bucket is not publicly accessible
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.recommendation: Log Archive S3 bucket must be private
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.action: S3 Block Public Access enabled; bucket policy denies public access; SCPs prevent public bucket creation

cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.title: Ensure CloudTrail trails are integrated with CloudWatch Logs
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.recommendation: CloudTrail logs streamed to CloudWatch for alerting
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.action: CloudTrail → CloudWatch Logs group; metric filters for root login, console login without MFA, unauthorized API calls

cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.title: Ensure CloudTrail logs are encrypted at rest
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.recommendation: S3 server-side encryption with KMS for CloudTrail logs
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.action: CloudTrail SSE-KMS with CMK; key policy restricts access to Log Archive account only

cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.title: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for unauthorized API calls
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.recommendation: Alert on unauthorized API calls
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.action: CloudWatch metric filter on CloudTrail logs for ErrorCode=*UnauthorizedAccess* + SNS alarm

cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.title: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for Console login without MFA
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.recommendation: Alert when anyone logs in to AWS console without MFA
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.action: CloudWatch metric filter: ConsoleLogin events where MfaAuthenticated = false; SNS alarm to ops team

cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.title: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for root account usage
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.recommendation: Alert on any root account API call or console login
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.action: CloudWatch metric filter for userIdentity.type = Root; SNS alert on trigger

cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.title: Ensure log metric filters for IAM policy changes
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.recommendation: Alert on IAM policy/role/group changes
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.action: CloudWatch filter for CreatePolicy, DeletePolicy, AttachRolePolicy events; SNS alarm

cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.title: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for AWS Config changes
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.recommendation: Alert on AWS Config service changes
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.action: CloudWatch filter for StopConfigurationRecorder, DeleteDeliveryChannel events; SNS alarm

cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.title: Ensure no security groups allow unrestricted ingress on port 22 (SSH)
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.recommendation: Block public SSH access
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.action: Security Groups: no 0.0.0.0/0 on port 22; use AWS Systems Manager Session Manager for EC2 access; Config rule: restricted-ssh

cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.title: Ensure no security groups allow unrestricted ingress on port 3389 (RDP)
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.recommendation: Block public RDP access
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.action: Security Groups: no 0.0.0.0/0 on port 3389; Config rule: restricted-common-ports

cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.title: Ensure VPC flow logging is enabled in all VPCs
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.recommendation: Enable VPC Flow Logs for all traffic
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.action: VPC Flow Logs enabled for ACCEPT + REJECT traffic; delivered to CloudWatch Logs + S3 in Log Archive

cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.title: Ensure default security group restricts all traffic
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.recommendation: Do not use default security group; restrict it completely
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.action: Remove all inbound/outbound rules from default Security Group; Config rule: vpc-default-security-group-closed

cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.title: Ensure S3 bucket access control is configured correctly
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.recommendation: Block public access on all S3 buckets
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.action: S3 Block Public Access enabled at account level and per-bucket; bucket policies enforce HTTPS-only access; SCP denies s3:PutBucketAcl with public-read

cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.title: Ensure S3 bucket versioning is enabled
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.recommendation: Enable versioning on critical S3 buckets
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.action: Enable versioning on: Log Archive bucket, static assets bucket, product images bucket; MFA Delete on Log Archive bucket

cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.title: Ensure S3 bucket replication is enabled
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.recommendation: Replicate critical data to secondary location
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.action: S3 Cross-Region Replication (CRR) for Log Archive → ap-southeast-1 as backup

cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.title: Ensure AWS Config is enabled in all regions
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.recommendation: Config records all resource changes
cis_aws_foundations_benchmark.action: AWS Config enabled in ap-southeast-7 (and all regions via Control Tower); Config Aggregator in Audit account

guardduty.action: GuardDuty findings → Security Hub → SNS alert to ops team; HIGH/CRITICAL findings page on-call engineer

security_hub.aggregation: Delegated administrator in Audit account; aggregates all 4 accounts
security_hub.action: Weekly Security Hub review; critical findings remediated within 24 hours

inspector_v2.action: Block ECR image push if CRITICAL CVE detected in CodePipeline gate

iam_access_analyzer.action: Weekly review of external access findings; alert on any S3 bucket or IAM role with external access

enforced_on: CloudFront (HTTPS only, redirect HTTP to HTTPS)
ALB (HTTPS listener on port 443; HTTP redirects to HTTPS)

at_rest.standard: AES-256 via AWS KMS Customer Managed Keys (CMK)

cloudtrail.retention: 7 years (S3 lifecycle: S3-IA after 90 days, Glacier after 1 year)

alarms: OpenSearch cluster status RED or YELLOW

s3.lifecycle: Move to S3-IA after 90 days; Glacier after 365 days

payment_compliance.approach: Stripe.js client-side tokenization — card data never touches platform servers
controls: Payment data never stored in Aurora or any platform database
Stripe webhooks validated with HMAC signature verification
Stripe API keys stored in Secrets Manager (never in code)
Stripe account has fraud detection enabled
Payment Service ECS task role has no access to other services

summary.compliance_readiness: READY when all REQUIRED controls implemented
next_steps: 1. Deploy Control Tower and configure all 4 accounts
2. Enable GuardDuty, Security Hub, Inspector v2, Config in all accounts
3. Configure CloudTrail org-level with S3 in Log Archive account
4. Apply all CloudWatch metric filters and alarms listed in benchmark 3.x
5. Enforce MFA via IAM Identity Center SCP
6. Deploy KMS CMKs for all data services
7. Configure VPC Flow Logs before any workload deployment
8. Run Security Hub CIS benchmark scan after infrastructure deployment
9. Remediate any CRITICAL/HIGH findings before go-live
10. Perform annual SOC 2 Type II readiness assessment
